channel.title: Deployment on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Deployment on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: ai: From Building Agents to Working with Them: Enterprise Agent Distribution in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry shifts focus from agent creation to distribution, emphasizing the enterprise problem of getting AI agents into users’ hands and operating in business workflows. The post frames deployment and adoption of agents as the new bottleneck after rapid progress in agent development.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog

item.title: devops+ai: AgentCore: Deployment, Operations, and Lessons Learned (4/4) 🔥
item.description:
The provided content is only a short teaser and does not include substantive release or changelog details. It appears to be a post about AgentCore deployment, operations, and lessons learned, but no具体 information is available from the excerpt.

  • Source: Let’s do DevOps
